fields.label: Aggregation function
fields.rationale: Count rows matching filters is the canonical KPI (pending invoices, overdue tasks). Sum / Average / Minimum / Maximum require a numeric aggregate_function_based_on.

fields.label: Numeric field (for non-Count functions)
fields.rationale: Required when function is Sum / Average / Minimum / Maximum. Names a numeric field on the source DocType. Empty when function=Count.

fields.label: Filters (JSON string)
fields.rationale: JSON string of Frappe filter triples, e.g. '[["Sales Invoice", "status", "=", "Unpaid"]]'. Empty list means no filter (aggregates across the whole DocType).

fields.label: Accent colour
fields.rationale: Subtle accent on the card face. Frappe's default blue (#449CF0) is a safe fallback; flip to red-tones for warning KPIs and green-tones for healthy KPIs.
